name: Yahoo Finance: Quote
summary: Yahoo Finance quote lookup for any ticker symbol. Works with stocks, ETFs, indices, crypto, forex, futures.
description: Fetch a current quote for any Yahoo Finance ticker — equities, ETFs, indices (^GSPC), crypto (BTC-USD), forex (EURUSD=X), futures, mutual funds. Returns price, change, key statistics. JS-first via fin-streamer + quote-statistics; falls back to body parsing only if those are missing.

ticker.description: Yahoo Finance ticker. Stocks/ETFs use the bare symbol (AAPL, SPY). Indices prefix with ^ (^GSPC, ^DJI, ^IXIC). Crypto uses BASE-QUOTE (BTC-USD, ETH-USD). Forex uses BASEQUOTE=X (EURUSD=X). Non-US listings use exchange suffix (BMW.DE, 7203.T).

steps.name: Navigate to Yahoo Finance quote page

inputs.script: const cleanArg = (v) => { const t = String(v == null ? '' : v).trim(); return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t) ? '' : t; }; const ticker = cleanArg(arg0); if (!ticker) throw new Error('ticker is required'); const norm = (v) => v && String(v).trim() ? String(v).replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() : 'N/A'; const titleMatch = document.title.match(/^(.*?)\s*\(([^)]+)\)/); const companyName = titleMatch ? titleMatch[1].trim() : 'N/A'; const txt = (sel) => (document.querySelector(sel)?.textContent || '').trim(); const stream = (field) => { const list = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(`fin-streamer[data-field="${field}"]`)).filter((el) => (el.textContent || '').trim()); const exact = list.find((el) => (el.getAttribute('data-symbol') || '').toUpperCase() === ticker.toUpperCase()); return (exact || list[0])?.textContent || ''; }; let price = txt('[data-testid="qsp-price"]'); let change = txt('[data-testid="qsp-price-change"]'); let pct = txt('[data-testid="qsp-price-change-percent"]'); if (pct) { pct = pct.replace(/^\(/, '').replace(/\)$/, ''); } if (!price) { const list = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('fin-streamer[data-field="regularMarketPrice"]')).filter((el) => (el.textContent || '').trim()); const exact = list.find((el) => (el.getAttribute('data-symbol') || '').toUpperCase() === ticker.toUpperCase()); price = (exact?.textContent || '').trim(); if (!change) change = (stream('regularMarketChange') || '').trim(); if (!pct) pct = (stream('regularMarketChangePercent') || '').trim(); } if (!price) { const body = (document.body?.innerText || '').replace(/\r/g, ''); const m = body.match(new RegExp(`\\(${ticker.replace(/[.^$*+?()\[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')}\\)\\s*([0-9][0-9,]*(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)\\s*([+-][0-9,]*(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)\\s*(\\([+-]?[0-9.,]+%\\))`)); if (m) { price = m[1]; change = m[2]; pct = m[3]; } } const stats = new Map(Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="quote-statistics"] li')).map((li) => { const label = (li.querySelector('.label')?.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const value = (li.querySelector('.value')?.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); return [label, value]; }).filter(([l]) => l)); const result = { ticker, company_name: norm(companyName), current_price: norm(price), price_change: norm(change), percent_change: norm(pct), previous_close: norm(stats.get('Previous Close')), open: norm(stats.get('Open')), days_range: norm(stats.get("Day's Range")), week_52_range: norm(stats.get('52 Week Range')), volume: norm(stats.get('Volume')), market_cap: norm(stats.get('Market Cap (intraday)') || stats.get('Market Cap')), pe_ratio: norm(stats.get('PE Ratio (TTM)')), eps: norm(stats.get('EPS (TTM)')) }; if (result.current_price === 'N/A' || result.company_name === 'N/A') { throw new Error('Unable to parse Yahoo quote header for ' + ticker); } return result;

help.summary: Yahoo Finance quote lookup for any ticker symbol. Works with stocks, ETFs, indices, crypto, forex, futures.

parameters.ticker: Yahoo Finance ticker. Stocks/ETFs use the bare symbol (AAPL, SPY). Indices prefix with ^ (^GSPC, ^DJI, ^IXIC). Crypto uses BASE-QUOTE (BTC-USD, ETH-USD). Forex uses BASEQUOTE=X (EURUSD=X). Non-US listings use exchange suffix (BMW.DE, 7203.T).

returns: Object: { ticker, company_name, current_price, price_change, percent_change, previous_close, open, days_range, week_52_range, volume, market_cap, pe_ratio, eps }. Fields not present for the asset class (e.g. PE ratio for crypto) come back as 'N/A'.
notes: JS-first: reads fin-streamer[data-field=...] and [data-testid='quote-statistics'] li. These are stable Yahoo widgets — selectors have outlasted multiple page redesigns.
Body-text regex parsing was the fallback in v1; v2 keeps a slimmer fallback only for the price/change triple in case fin-streamer fails to mount.
Pair with finance/yahoo-news for headlines on the same ticker.
For Google Finance as an alternate source, use google/finance (workflows/google/google-finance.json — supports any TICKER:EXCHANGE).
